Small description of the overall solution (one or two sentences max).

## Implementation & Notes
* Summary of the technical approach. Identify talking points where reviewers' attention should be drawn to.

## How to Test
* Steps to verify the changes locally (e.g., specific BDD scenarios, manual smoke test commands).

## Breaking Changes
Does this change the API surface or behavior in a way that could break existing users? If so, detail the impact. Drop this section if not applicable.

## Suggested Commit Message
- The commit title should be limited to 72 characters.
- Each line of the commit body should be limited to 80 characters.
- We use the following format:

```
S3-XXX Concise summary explaining the "what" of the changes (#XXX)

Provide context on the "why" and "how" of your changes. The commit
title covers "what", the body covers "why it was done this way".

Co-Authored-By: <if applicable>
```
